description: Deploy this git repo into a Railway environment that matches the workspace template Odoo 19 (stock production). NOT odoo-19-live-2-template / odoo-19-dev-2-template (factory template 2).

deploy.startCommand: /bin/bash -lc 'set -e; host="${ODOO_DATABASE_HOST}"; port="${ODOO_DATABASE_PORT:-5432}"; echo "Waiting for Postgres at ${host}:${port}..."; until (echo >"/dev/tcp/${host}/${port}") 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; echo "Postgres is ready"; addons=""; if [[ -n "${ODOO_ADDONS_PATH:-}" ]]; then addons=" --addons-path=${ODOO_ADDONS_PATH}"; fi; exec odoo --http-port="${PORT:-8069}" --init=all --without-demo=True --proxy-mode --db_host="${ODOO_DATABASE_HOST}" --db_port="${ODOO_DATABASE_PORT:-5432}" --db_user="${ODOO_DATABASE_USER}" --db_password="${ODOO_DATABASE_PASSWORD}" --database="${ODOO_DATABASE_NAME}" --smtp="${ODOO_SMTP_HOST}" --smtp-port="${ODOO_SMTP_PORT_NUMBER}" --smtp-user="${ODOO_SMTP_USER}" --smtp-password="${ODOO_SMTP_PASSWORD}" --email-from="${ODOO_EMAIL_FROM}"${addons}'

deploy_steps: Spin up or open a Railway project deployed from sidebar template Odoo 19 (Postgres + Odoo services).
On Odoo service: Settings → Source → Connect GitHub repo rjr3000/odoo-19-1e branch master.
Set Config file path to /railway.json (builder DOCKERFILE, dockerfile build-context/Dockerfile).
Leave Postgres service on ghcr.io/railwayapp-templates/postgres-ssl:16 — do not swap to odoo-19-db-1.
Paste Odoo variables from deploy/railway/railway.variables.stock-production.env.example; fill ODOO_SMTP_PASSWORD.
Mount volume /var/lib/odoo on Odoo; /var/lib/postgresql on Postgres.
Networking → Odoo public domain target port 8069.
Apply start command and healthcheck from this file (or rely on railway.json deploy block).

notes.not_template_2: Factory template 2 uses evoluzion26/odoo-19-db-1 + odoo-19-app-1, CONFIG_PROFILE, and entrypoint-odoo-app.sh. This manifest is stock Odoo 19 only.
notes.enterprise: odoo-19-1e Dockerfile bakes enterprise at /opt/odoo/enterprise; stock start command adds --addons-path via ODOO_ADDONS_PATH.
notes.smtp: Template default ODOO_SMTP_PASSWORD may use ${SHARED_LOGIN_PASSWORD} at deploy time — set explicitly on the service.
